adapters.input_normalization: PDF page rendering and service-side normalization; verify locally before use
adapters.promotion_rule: Output remains a derived candidate until human review confirms an exact native source anchor.

adapters.input_normalization: AutoProcessor resize and normalization with bounding boxes rescaled to source image dimensions
adapters.promotion_rule: Detected regions remain derived candidates and cannot establish document meaning or a case fact.

adapters.input_normalization: AutoImageProcessor with post-processing to original source image dimensions
adapters.promotion_rule: Detected regions remain derived candidates until exact source anchoring and human review.
